positive: A whimsical and stylized forest scene featuring abstract bioluminescent flora and fauna. The main subject is a magnificent, stylized stag with glowing antlers, surrounded by exaggerated, jungle-inspired leaves and glowing mushrooms. The style is 'Art Nouveau meets Neon Graffiti,' characterized by swirling, elegant lines, deep jewel tones contrasted with electric teal, violet, and lime green luminescence. The composition is highly symmetrical and centered, designed as a repeating pattern print. Strong, clean silhouettes are paramount. Dramatic backlighting makes the edges of the foliage pop. The overall mood is magical, mysterious, and energetic. Highly detailed, vector-art quality.
negative: blurry, bad anatomy, text, logo, watermark, artifacts, low detail, copyright, poorly rendered limbs, extra limbs, noise, grayscale, photographic, photorealistic, signature, border
